deliverable_summary: Full-stack audit of Yentl (yentl.it) — version state, UI consistency, backend pipeline wiring, trimodal eval findings, 7-phase fix path. Goal: critique audit + drive Yentl to ship browser+extension ASAP, AI Act deadline 2026-08-02.

members.name: Head of Claude Code at Anthropic
Head of Speech AI at AssemblyAI
Head of Threat Intelligence at CrowdStrike

blind_spots_offered: Chrome Web Store distribution / Manifest V3 — suggested: Head of Browser Platform at Mozilla

apple-uiux-head.summary: Live workspace has no dominant hierarchy; consent gate is checklist anti-pattern; verdict has no shareable URL; heat signal is theater without prosody. Ship: collapse to single-signal primary + sequential consent flow + verdict-as-shareable URL.

anthropic-claude-code-head.summary: AI architecture is sound but phase ordering is wrong. AudioMeter is separate from speaker attribution. Gateway SPOF needs Phase A fallback (20 lines). Ephemeral cache costs money - switch to prefix. Ship 2-week Phase A: types fix + prefix cache + gateway fallback + ClaimStance schema.

stripe-engineering-head.summary: P0 DISCOVERY: persistence layer does not exist. db client never imported outside its schema. Sessions only in Zustand memory. Paywall missing. Gateway SPOF. Extension monolith 1324 LOC. Ship: persistence wire + Stripe Checkout in a week.

data-scientist-metrics.summary: N=8 is exploratory not validating. Need N≈60-96 stratified for statistical validation. 80%/90%/95% gates unanchored vs DIHARD field benchmarks. No launch metrics defined. Prosody/ASR experiments confounded. Ship: 5-metric dashboard + 60-window stratified corpus + pre-registered phase criteria.

startup-founder-scrappy.summary: Won't ship in 9 weeks at this pace. Over-engineering invisible problem. 14 agent streams is bloat. AI Act is not THE deadline. Cut Phase E and G entirely. Ship 3 phases: paywall+verdict URL+hygiene weeks 1-2, types fix weeks 3-5, AI Act polish weeks 6-8, buffer week 9.

assemblyai-speech-head.summary: Phase 0 before Phase 1 is wrong order. 3-line fix in deepgram-batch.ts preserves words[]+confidence and stops speaker_id=0 lie. dominantSpeaker by word count is wrong - use confidence-weighted duration. Tab capture architecturally incompatible with cloud diarization. OverlapClass missing latent_overlap. Run diarize_model=latest on corpus (no consent needed) + benchmark AssemblyAI/Soniox on 8 candidates.

politifact-editor-head.summary: 8 labels need comprehension bridge - mandatory why-this-not-adjacent sentence. Source reputation 3-tier hardcoded list fails IFCN Principle 4 - need 4 tiers + primary_document flag. No verdict URL = no correction/retraction loop. Algorithmic claim selection makes editorial decisions without accountability - need rejected_claims log. Ship: 4-field ClaimCard + /verdict/[id] + /dispute + /corrections + What-Yentl-Doesnt-Fact-Check methodology + marker taxonomy provenance note.

crowdstrike-security-head.summary: Two P0 launch blockers: (1) Unauthenticated AI route cost exfiltration - no rate limit, ~30 min to drain $1K Gateway balance. OWASP API6:2023. (2) ConsentGate localStorage tampering - any attacker can forge consent. Bypasses BIPA/AI Act. OWASP A04:2021. Ship: Cloudflare WAF + token-bucket scoped to Clerk JWT + server-side consent records to Neon.

regulatory-compliance.summary: BIPA voiceprint exposure $1K-5K per violation strict liability - cannot enable diarize:true for any real user before BIPA-specific written release + DELETE /api/biometric ship. AI Act Art 50 needs machine-readable disclosure on verdict surface - verdict URL gap is product+compliance gap simultaneously. Ship Phase B+C as single regulatory sprint by 2026-07-01.

skeptic-end-user.summary: Closes tab in 30 seconds. Consent gate fires before earning any reason to care. Don't argue Yentl it lands weird for strangers. Ship: one real pre-run verdict before signup - Netflix trailer-before-paywall pattern.

running_summary: 10/10 quorum. Standard mode. Reports synthesized. Key consensus: persistence layer is P0 (Stripe discovery), verdict URL ships pre-launch, paywall ships pre-launch, Gateway fallback collapses to Phase A, prefix cache 1-line win, stop speaker_id=0 lie, server-side consent, Cloudflare WAF rate limit. Key tensions: foundation-first WHICH foundation, Phase G timing (cut/collapse/benchmark-first), BIPA timing, landing-page first-impression, Phase E prosody (defer/cut/30-line patch).

confirmed: Standard mode (no debate, single confirmation gate)
open: Tension #1: Full audit Phase A-G vs Scrappy 3-phase MVP
Tension #2: Phase G timing (cut vs collapse vs benchmark-first)
Tension #5: Phase E prosody (defer vs cut vs 30-line patch)
Tension #4: Landing-page strategy (demo vs onboarding vs revenue-funnel)
contentious: Scrappy's cut-Phase-E and cut-Phase-G positions vs the rest
